scripts.asyncapi:generate:backend: npx rimraf ./backend/src/shared/generated && npx @asyncapi/cli generate models typescript ./schema/asyncapi.yaml -o ./backend/src/shared/generated --tsModelType=interface --tsRawPropertyNames --tsExportType=default
scripts.asyncapi:generate:frontend: npx rimraf ./frontend/src/generated && npx @asyncapi/cli generate models typescript ./schema/asyncapi.yaml -o ./frontend/src/generated --tsModelType=interface --tsRawPropertyNames --tsExportType=default
scripts.asyncapi:generate: npm run asyncapi:generate:backend && npm run asyncapi:generate:frontend
